message:
I have a friend who always seems to be a step ahead when it comes to preparedness. Last week, she invited me over for a casual dinner, but when I arrived, I was greeted with a full-on emergency drill. "Just in case!" she said, as she pulled out her go-bag to show me its impressive contents: water, snacks, a flashlight, and even a mini first-aid kit! 

While I admired her dedication, I couldn’t help but chuckle at how gloriously over-prepared she was. But honestly? It got me thinking about my own readiness. It’s easy to let these things slide until we really need them. 

So, I went home and took a good look at my own supplies. I found a few things that could use some updating and made a little plan to get my family more organized. Just a few small steps can make a big difference! 

Have you ever found yourself getting a little carried away in the name of preparedness? What’s the most ‘extra’ thing you have in your emergency kit?
